hypothesis: Customers understand FUN-TASTIC as an expandable living platform rather than a single organizer
current_evidence: Brand strategy only; no customer evidence
primary_metric: Correctly explains Base plus add-on modules and expansion without supplied terminology
proposed_success_rule: At least one message reaches 70% correct unprompted comprehension in the decision test and confusion is not concentrated in a priority segment
proposed_failure_rule: No message reaches 50% correct comprehension after one wording revision
pilot_sample_proposal: 8-12 participants per message cell for comprehension debugging; not decision-grade
decision_sample_rule: Power calculation after pilot baseline and target effect are approved
automatic_stop_condition: Stop the tested message if it repeatedly implies electronics connectivity one identical Base for wet and dry Zones or LEGO compatibility

hypothesis: A common interface creates a reason to buy follow-up modules
current_evidence: Strategy and external platform analogy only; no FUN-TASTIC behavior evidence
primary_test: Interview plus constrained add-on choice after Starter Kit exposure
primary_metric: Names a concrete next module and chooses compatibility as a reason under a fixed choice task
proposed_success_rule: Across priority segments participants identify concrete follow-up jobs and compatibility is selected for utility rather than lock-in
proposed_failure_rule: Interest is limited to the included items or compatibility is mainly described as fear of being trapped
pilot_sample_proposal: 4-6 interviews per priority segment plus pilot choice task; directional only
decision_sample_rule: Set from pilot choice distribution and minimum commercially meaningful lift
automatic_stop_condition: Stop if customers consistently prefer independent products because the proprietary standard adds risk without useful breadth

hypothesis: A Starter Kit explains the platform better than a single product or Base alone
current_evidence: Prior market pattern and internal strategy; no direct experiment
primary_metric: Three-second platform comprehension and correct description of included value
proposed_success_rule: Desk Starter improves comprehension over Base-only and does not reduce day-one usefulness versus the single organizer
proposed_failure_rule: Starter Kit is seen as a forced bundle or fails to improve comprehension after one content revision
pilot_sample_proposal: 8-12 participants per offer cell for pilot debugging; not decision-grade
decision_sample_rule: Power calculation using pilot comprehension baseline and target lift
automatic_stop_condition: Stop the Base-only entry offer if most participants cannot state an immediate use after clarification

hypothesis: The attachment experience creates purchase value rather than unnecessary complexity
current_evidence: Interface family analysis only; no physical user evidence
primary_test: Interview concept probe now; physical interface comparison later
primary_metric: Importance ranking plus observed attach/remove behavior and voluntary repeat interaction
proposed_success_rule: Customers describe confirmation and rearrangement as useful and physical testing later shows fluent repeat use without instruction
proposed_failure_rule: Customers treat assembly as extra work or physical testing shows confusion force fear or frequent partial engagement
pilot_sample_proposal: Concept interviews now; physical sample size deferred until prototypes exist
decision_sample_rule: Separate usability study and power plan after Top 3 prototypes exist
automatic_stop_condition: Do not claim validation from text or diagrams; stop the claim until physical interaction evidence exists

hypothesis: Cross-Zone reuse lowers purchase risk and increases platform value
current_evidence: Universal platform strategy only; no customer evidence
primary_metric: Chooses at least one credible second Zone and explains reuse of an owned module or familiar interface
proposed_success_rule: Cross-Zone reuse appears spontaneously or survives a forced trade-off against a cheaper room-specific product
proposed_failure_rule: Interest stays limited to one Zone or participants expect different materials Bases or aesthetics that break the promise
pilot_sample_proposal: 4-6 interviews per priority segment and 8-12 per scenario cell for pilot
decision_sample_rule: Power calculation after credible second-Zone baseline is observed
automatic_stop_condition: Stop universal physical-Base messaging if participants infer unsafe wet heat or load suitability

hypothesis: Color and personalization support purchase without overpowering core function
current_evidence: Brand strategy and category analogy only; no customer evidence
primary_test: Collection choice task with function held constant
primary_metric: Functional module selected first; color or personalization improves preference among equally useful options
proposed_success_rule: Function remains the primary first-choice reason while color or personalization creates a measurable secondary preference
proposed_failure_rule: Color is the only remembered value or participants cannot explain the module's job
pilot_sample_proposal: 8-12 participants per collection condition for pilot; not decision-grade
decision_sample_rule: Power calculation after pilot establishes functional baseline
automatic_stop_condition: Stop a color or edition concept if it obscures compatibility function or environment information

hypothesis: A long-term compatibility promise materially increases trust
current_evidence: Brand constitution only; no customer evidence
primary_test: Message A/B with and without explicit compatibility commitment
primary_metric: Trust rating and choice reason after viewing identical offer content
proposed_success_rule: Explicit compatibility promise increases trust without increasing lock-in concern or disbelief
proposed_failure_rule: Promise has no effect is not believed or increases concern because service evidence is absent
pilot_sample_proposal: 8-12 participants per promise cell for language debugging
decision_sample_rule: Power calculation after pilot trust variance and target effect are approved
automatic_stop_condition: Stop using a ten-year claim publicly until operational ownership migration policy and legal review exist
